title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Jet Freight Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Jet Freight Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!
